meta.notes: Fresh session on pika-media-env. All 3 accounts analyzed successfully. T1+T2+T3 were issued as parallel tool_use calls (same timestamp 12:18:20Z); container ran them sequentially (T1=124.5s, T2=83.0s, T3=96.5s, total=304s). All 3 triggered LLM JSON truncation on pass 2, all auto-repaired. NOTE: in-script LLM (~75s × 3 = 227.5s) is inside tool_calls_s; use true_llm_pct (76.2%) for cross-skill comparison. Session: sesn_011CZv5PBenrtU3Pi5ta79ry.

task.name: social-account-analyzer
task.purpose: Analyze 3 social accounts: @natgeo on Instagram, @NASA on X/Twitter, @khaby.lame on TikTok
task.expected_output: JSON with profile metrics, engagement analysis, and growth recommendations per account

install.notes: Skills pre-loaded. Dependencies pre-installed in pika-media-env.

asset_acquisition.notes: No video download — SAA is API+LLM only.

steps.name: t1_instagram
steps.notes: script_ms=124490. fetch_s=49.1 (own Connect Proxy failed, fell back to Apify public scraper). llm_s=74.9 (pass1+pass2, truncation+repair on pass2). success=true. @natgeo: 274.9M followers, ER=0.03%, avg_likes=71K, avg_views=321K, posting_freq=3.8×/week, best_format=Carousel, trend=insufficient_data.

steps.name: t2_x
steps.notes: script_ms=83040. fetch_s=6.7 (Nova auth failed, fell back to RapidAPI public). llm_s=76.0 (pass1+pass2, truncation+repair on pass2). success=true. @NASA: 90.9M followers, ER=0.03%, avg_likes=26.6K, avg_views=727K, posting_freq=20×/week, best_format=Video, trend=Growing.

steps.name: t3_tiktok
steps.notes: script_ms=96482. fetch_s=19.6 (Apify clockworks~free-tiktok-scraper). llm_s=76.6 (pass1+pass2, truncation+repair on pass2). success=true. @khaby.lame: 160.7M followers, ER=0.91%, avg_likes=1.44M, avg_views=30.17M, posting_freq=1×/week, best_format=Video, trend=Growing.

execution.notes: T1+T2+T3 bash calls issued in parallel (same timestamp 12:18:20Z); container executed sequentially (T1→T2→T3). All 3 triggered LLM JSON truncation on pass 2, all auto-repaired. llm_overhead_s (43.1s) = inter-tool orchestration LLM only. In-script LLM (2 passes per account) = ~74.9+76.0+76.6 = 227.5s, buried in tool_calls_s. True LLM time = 43.1 + 227.5 = 270.6s = 76.2% of wall.

delivery.notes: No CDN upload — SAA outputs JSON to stdout only. Results also saved to /data/.pikabot/social-account-analyzer/ in container.

totals.true_llm_note: llm_overhead_s captures orchestration LLM only (43.1s). true_llm_overhead_s adds in-script LLM (2-pass Pika proxy calls: 74.9+76.0+76.6=227.5s). Use true_llm_pct for cross-skill comparison.
